headline: Regions Bank Names Veteran Banker Amy Barrentine as Head of Regions Business Capital
summary: BIRMINGHAM, Ala., April 30, 2026--Regions Bank on Thursday announced Amy Barrentine has been elevated to serve as head of Regions Business Capital, a specialty finance team within the bank’s Corporate Banking Group.
